panels.description: Assumption: count nodes from OTel node CPU series.
panels.title: Running Nodes

panels.description: Assumption: count pods from OTel pod memory series.
panels.title: Running Pods

panels.description: Assumption: count containers from OTel container memory series.
panels.title: Running Containers

panels.description: Assumption: count volumes from k8s.volume.capacity.
panels.title: Volumes with Capacity

panels.description: Assumption: count volumes from k8s.volume.available.
panels.title: Volumes with Available Space

panels.description: Assumption: using OTel container restarts gauge.
panels.title: Container Restarts

panels.description: Assumption: replaces kubelet runtime ops with node CPU time rate.
panels.title: Node CPU Usage Rate

panels.description: Assumption: replaces kubelet errors with node memory usage.
panels.title: Node Memory Usage

panels.description: Assumption: replaces kubelet duration with pod CPU time rate.
panels.title: Pod CPU Usage Rate

panels.description: Assumption: replaces pod start rate with container restarts per pod.
panels.title: Pod Restart Count

panels.description: Assumption: replaces pod start duration with pod memory usage.
panels.title: Pod Memory Usage

panels.description: Assumption: replaces storage rate with container CPU requests.
panels.title: Container CPU Requests

panels.description: Assumption: replaces storage errors with container CPU limits.
panels.title: Container CPU Limits

panels.description: Assumption: replaces storage duration with volume capacity.
panels.title: Volume Capacity

panels.description: Assumption: replaces cgroup rate with container memory requests.
panels.title: Container Memory Requests

panels.description: Assumption: replaces cgroup quantile with container memory limits.
panels.title: Container Memory Limits

panels.description: Assumption: replaces PLEG rate with container CPU time rate.
panels.title: Container CPU Usage Rate

panels.description: Assumption: replaces PLEG interval with volume available bytes.
panels.title: Volume Available

panels.description: Assumption: derived as capacity minus available.

targets.expr: sum((k8s_volume_capacity_bytes{k8s_cluster_name="$cluster", k8s_node_name=~"$instance"} - k8s_volume_available_bytes{k8s_cluster_name="$cluster", k8s_node_name=~"$instance"})) by (k8s_node_name, k8s_namespace_name, k8s_pod_name, k8s_volume_type)

panels.title: Volume Used

panels.description: Assumption: replaces RPC rate with OTel container ready gauge.
panels.title: Containers Ready

panels.description: Assumption: replaces request duration with container memory usage.
panels.title: Container Memory Usage

panels.description: Assumption: replaces kubelet process memory with OTel node memory.
panels.title: Node Memory Usage

panels.description: Assumption: replaces kubelet process CPU with OTel node CPU time rate.
panels.title: Node CPU Usage

panels.description: Assumption: replaces goroutines with ready containers.
panels.title: Containers Ready
